turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi, technical support here. How can I help you today?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Before we troubleshoot, this call may be recorded for quality and training.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: To look up your setup, what's the email you registered with?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Of course, both are what you've got on file.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: The app won't load at all, it just sits on a blank screen.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Got it. First, can you tell me what you've already tried?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'm going to send a password reset link, watch for it in a moment.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Alright, it's coming back up I think.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: This isn't working. I want to speak to a supervisor.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I hear you, this has taken too long. Let me bring in a specialist.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: You're back up and running. Thanks for bearing with me.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: No, that's it. Thanks for sticking with it.
